system.description:
When you order food for yourself from any restaurant, you may use an Agency company card as long as you order only from this approved list of foods:

Samosas; Crepes (served folded); Onigiri. Sandwiches (cut into triangles). Pizza or pie (by the slice). Hamentaschen; Arrow Crab; Swiss Triangular Chocolates.

Additional options must be approved by your General Manager.
